messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: Jack, I wanted to touch base on the escalations your team has raised.

messages.speaker: Jack Turner
messages.text: Thanks, Jane. We've had 12 tickets open this quarter, and some have been sitting for weeks.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: I see that. We're assigning a dedicated engineer to handle your account going forward.

messages.speaker: Jack Turner
messages.text: That helps. But our renewal is in 30 days and frankly, my leadership is questioning the investment.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: Completely understand. What would it take to restore confidence?

messages.speaker: Jack Turner
messages.text: Pricing adjustment would be a start. We've seen competitor offers from RivalCo that are 25% less.

messages.speaker: Jane Park
messages.text: Let me take that back to our team and come back with a retention offer.

messages.speaker: Jack Turner
messages.text: Also, the onboarding for our new modules is behind. That's affecting our go-live timeline.
